headline: Corpay Inc (NYSE:CPAY) Beats Q1 Estimates, Raises Full-Year Guidance
summary: Corpay beats Q1 estimates with $1.261B revenue and $5.80 EPS, raises full-year guidance, but shares dip slightly on cautious revenue outlook.

headline: Corpay: Q1 Earnings Snapshot
summary: ATLANTA — ATLANTA — Corpay, Inc. on Thursday reported first-quarter net income of $350.1 million. On a per-share basis, the Atlanta-based company said it had net income of $5.07. Earnings,...

headline: Corpay Set to Report Q1 Earnings: Here's What Investors Should Know
summary: CPAY will post Q1'26 results after market close on May 7, with revenues seen at $1.2B and EPS at $5.5 after four straight beats.
